ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-23-2025 Continued To Mar-04-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for petition for accounting, fees, and final distribution.

Dept. 204; Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Bailiff: Deputy Musto; Not reported

Petitioner Robert Rosoff represented by Noe-Marie Claraty, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.

Court has reviewed all moving papers and addresses the 12 points set forth by the probate examiner.

Petitioner shall file an Amendment to its petition addressing each of the issues brought forth by the probate examiner. If there are any loose ends that need to be dealt with, the Court will bifurcate issues as request by Petitioner. Court orders matter continued to Mar-04-2026 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2024 Continued To Jul-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Guy Noyes appeared by zoom for Robert Rosoff (executor).

Mr. Noyes stated that he ran into some unexpected difficulties with the accounting and that he needs a little more time. The report on status of administration is continued to July 16, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The accounting is due by July 5, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Continued To Jun-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Guy Noyes appeared by zoom for Robert Rosoff (executor).

The court stated that it is still waiting for a proof of service and a proposed order. Mr. Noyes stated that they are still working on getting the notice mailed out, that they need a little more time to do a final accounting/final distribution and requested a 30-day continuance. Mr. Noyes also stated that he believes they can get their petition filed by May 29th. The Petition for Approval of Status Report, etc. is continued to June 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-21-2024 Continued To Mar-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Nathan Pastor, Esq., for Robert Rosoff, Executor.

At the court's query, counsel offers a report on the delay caused by a related probate matter in Louisianna. Counsel also reports that there is a petition pending in the court's e-fling queue.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Mar-20-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-27-2023 Continued To Feb-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nathan Pastor, Esq., via Zoom, for Robert Rosoff, Personal Representative.

The court and counsel discuss the status of the estate and of a petition thereon.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Feb-21-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file a petition by Feb-14-2024.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-07-2023 Continued To Nov-29-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Continued To Nov-07-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randi Teichman appeared by zoom for and with Robert Rosoff (executor) by zoom.

Mrs. Teichman stated that she and her client have had some communication issues, that she will be filing a substitution of attorney and that there are a number of items that need to be done such as the accounting and the taxes. Mrs. Teichman also stated that one of the beneficiaries a 95-year-old died after the decedent, that she had no children, but she has ten siblings in Louisiana, and they have children, and that she does not know how to find all of the heirs. Mr. Rosoff stated that he plans to hire another attorney. Status on close of estate is continued to November 7, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for an update as to how things are progressing.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Nov-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randi S. Teichman, via Zoom, for and with Robert Rosoff, Personal Representative.

The court reminds counsel that moving forward, it would be in her best interest to identify the specific code sections to support a petition for preliminary distribution due to differing notice requirements. Counsel reports that Celeste Green is in the process of opening Mary Lindsay's probate estate in Louisiana (LA). The court and counsel discuss the possibility of the court ordering a bond. Counsel advises that the will does not request a bond. The court advises that it is not likely to order a bond at this time but advises counsel to consider one at the time of final distribution.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 10, 2019 is admitted to probate. Robert Rosoff is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 17, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jan-11-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

10:52 a.m. The matter was called. No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that there is no proposed order, that there is no proof of publication, that there is no proof of mailing of notice, and that there is no duties and liabilities form. The Petition for Probate of Will is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
